title: [v4.2.0-rhel] Add container GID to additional groups
body:
This is an automated cherry-pick of #15618

/assign mheon

```release-note
NONE
```

comments.body: Does this needs a new tag of https://github.com/containers/buildah/tree/release-1.27 ? I can't see how `podman build` issue is fixed here.
@flouthoc yes, I believe we'll need to spin a never version of Buildah and vendor it in this branch to with the CVE fix in there to address the build portion of this fix.
PR here will cut a tag once merged: https://github.com/containers/buildah/pull/4224

[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *openshift-cherrypick-robot*, *rhatdan* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Fpodman). The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/v4.2.0-rhel/OWNERS)~~ [rhatdan] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment
Merged too early i think this needed buildah vendor as well.
